sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungdamna thupha ka za, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Tua thupha na gen inla,
“Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Gam khempeuh ah pai inla, Mual kal, gungal kan dinga;
Va gen
in Topa thupha, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Gunpi kan in kiko in, “Jesuh in
hong gum hi!”
Gamla nai mi kiang gen in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Tuikulh panin
kiko in, A gal-khat na thawn sak in;
Leitungah lungdamna in, “Jesuh in hong gum
hi!”

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Gal kapna sung kiko in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Singlamteh
tung sihna in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Hehpihna i deih ciangin, Tua thute na ngaihsun
in;
Sihna zawh man lasa in, “Jesuh in hong gum hi!”

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitungah na kiko in,
“Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
Mi khempeuh lungdamsak in, “Jesuh in hong gum
hi!”
Mual tung le kuam thuk sungah, Hong phelna thu gen in-la;
Hih zawhna thu lasakna,
“Jesuh in hong gum hi!”
